mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(log_code), 0) + 1 FROM logs
INSERT INTO logs ( log_code, project_code, user_code, action_type, target_type, target_code, created_at, meta ) VALUES ( #{logCode}, #{projectCode}, #{userCode}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetCode}, SYSDATE, #{meta, jdbcType=CLOB} )
mapper.select: SELECT l.log_code, l.project_code, l.user_code, u.name AS user_name, l.action_type, l.target_type, l.target_code, l.created_at, l.meta FROM logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = l.user_code WHERE l.target_type = #{targetType} AND l.target_code = #{targetCode} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.log_code DESC
